title: Settings
description: Application settings, config sources, storage adapters, and experimental AI features.

storageAdapters.title: Storage adapters
storageAdapters.description: Local download, HTTP upload and webhook adapters are configured in Export Center. This keeps storage delivery close to ZIP export/import workflow.

externalTransport.title: External transport
externalTransport.description: Recommended integration path: AuditM-Field exports a ZIP package, then sends it to a backend, webhook or n8n workflow. AI/OCR/LLM processing should live behind that transport layer, not directly inside the PWA.

annotatorEntry.title: Annotator entry point
annotatorEntry.description: The Annotator page currently opens a concrete photo route. If opened without a selected photo, it shows Photo not found. A future UX polish step can turn it into a photo picker / recent photos screen.

aiReadyLayer.title: AI-ready layer
aiReadyLayer.description: OCR, CV, LLM and RAG integrations should be optional adapters. The PWA should keep human-entered data and imported/AI-generated suggestions separated by source.

localFirstData.title: Local-first data
localFirstData.description: Inspections, photos, annotations, checklist answers and export jobs are stored in IndexedDB. ZIP export/import is the main portability mechanism for MVP.

nextSettingsCandidates.title: Next settings candidates
nextSettingsCandidates.description: Later this page can host default config source, storage adapter presets, import/export cleanup actions, local database size indicator and experimental feature toggles.
